author: w3Lb
content: WHY: surface for #91. SCOPE: ripsed-cli + ripsed-json. CLI: add -U/--multiline flag (rg-compatible spelling), valid with find/replace and -d delete; reject with a clear error when combined with line-scoped ops. JSON: add "multiline": true field on replace/delete ops (serde default false; validate_op rejects it on other op kinds with operation_index in the error). Script mode: --multiline token in .rip replace/delete lines. Docs: README CLI reference + JSON operations table + schema in xtask gen-schema. TESTS: integration tests in cli_human_test/cli_json_test/script_test for cross-line replace; error-path test for multiline+indent rejection. BLOCKED BY #91.
